features: RECHARGE UP TO 1000 TIMES: Always ready when you need them, Delivered pre-charged and ready to use
SUSTAINABLE PACKAGING: The 0% plastic packaging is 100% recyclable.
GUARANTEED TO LAST 5 YEARS IN STORAGE*

ENJOY HOURS OF USE IN EVERYDAY DEVICES: With up to 1000 cycles, get hours of power in TV remotes, wireless mouse, toys, cameras, clocks, suitable for appliances powered by AAA batteries based on manufacturer recommendation.
LONG LASTING POWER: Get battery life out of power-hungry devices with these powerful 750 mAh NiMH AAA batteries from Duracell
HOLDS CHARGE FOR UP TO 12 MONTHS when not in use**
ITEMS INCLUDED: 1x Pack of 4 Duracell Rechargeable Batteries, Size: AAA, Capacity: 750 mAh, Voltage: 1.2 V, Type: NiMH, Length: 44.5 mm, Diameter: 10.5 mm
*Unused batteries are rechargeable after 5 years of storage. Commercial guarantee.**Retain up to 80 percent of their charge after 12 months, when not in use
